description: Renders a template of child components once for each record in a database table. Children can use {{fieldName}} in text props or set dataField to bind to columns. This is how you build lists, feeds, and grids from DB data.

filterValue.description: Filter value or {{template}}. Only records where filterField=filterValue are shown.

layout.description: Flex layout that controls how repeated items are arranged (column for list, row+wrap for grid)

notes: Children receive the current record as context. Use {{fieldName}} in Text.text or dataField in any component.
For a card list: layout.direction='column', gap=12, children=[Frame with nested Text components].
For a grid: layout.direction='row', layout.wrap=true, gap=8.
filterValue supports {{template}} — e.g. filterValue='{{category}}' when inside another DataRepeater.
The entire children array is cloned once per record.

examples.description: Blog post feed — vertical list of cards
